title: End-to-end validation and launch checklist (read-only v1)
description:
## Intent
Validate cloud v1 behavior before launch and record release readiness.

## Scope
- End-to-end verification from Git push to UI update
- SSE fallback sanity verification
- Tenant isolation verification
- Read-only v1 checklist completion

## Definition of Done
- E2E path (webhook -> sync -> IoT -> UI) passes.
- SSE fallback sanity checks pass.
- Security/isolation checks are signed off.
- Launch checklist is complete and attached to epic context.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Started launch-readiness tracking with a concrete read-only v1 checklist artifact.
Evidence: Added docs/CLOUD_LAUNCH_CHECKLIST.md with checklist items tied to deploy/auth/sync/realtime/ops gates.
Next: execute remaining live checks after deploy blocker is cleared and attach evidence links per checklist section.
Risk/Blocker: all unchecked items requiring live AWS runtime are currently gated by tskl-eo2.5.1 Docker daemon blocker.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: E2E validation moved past missing-git failure but still not at green path.
Evidence: worker runtime now includes git; latest deployed worker fails on git safe.directory ownership check against EFS path.
Next: apply and deploy safe-directory patch, then rerun queue/webhook smoke to capture cloud_sync_completed event.
Risk/Blocker: stack remains in UPDATE_COMPLETE_CLEANUP_IN_PROGRESS, delaying next deploy.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: E2E validation advanced with successful queue->worker->repo sync execution in deployed env.
Evidence: CloudWatch log stream 2026/03/07/[]ba482c47d28448bf8e598b306c0d36fd shows successful fetch/reset to commit 721fb9f; no runtime exception in latest runs.
Next: complete signed webhook ingress test and browser MQTT receive validation, then finalize checklist.
Risk/Blocker: CloudFormation stack cleanup stall prevents clean CDK-driven redeploy cadence.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Launch-checklist validation unblocked after stack recovery and clean redeploy.
Evidence: stack status now UPDATE_COMPLETE; worker invocation and queue smoke both succeed post-fix with repo reset to latest commit.
Next: finish remaining checklist items: signed webhook ingress evidence + browser MQTT receive/fallback verification.
Risk/Blocker: obtaining signed webhook payload is gated by secretsmanager:GetSecretValue access.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Checklist advanced with green authenticated API baseline and realtime bootstrap contract validation in deployed cloud stack.
Evidence: /api/config 200, /api/issues 200, /api/realtime/bootstrap 200 with topic projects/anthus/kanbus/events and IoT endpoint payload.
Next: finish signed webhook evidence and browser MQTT receive/fallback validation, then close checklist.
Risk/Blocker: same webhook secret IAM restriction blocks signed ingress verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Performed authenticated curl smoke against deployed API and app shell route.
Evidence: 200 for /anthus/kanbus/api/config, /issues, /realtime/bootstrap, and /anthus/kanbus (HTML app shell).
Next: validate browser login + MQTT message receive path and signed webhook trigger.
Risk/Blocker: signed webhook validation still blocked by Secrets Manager permission gap.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Launch checklist updated in-practice to reflect test-driven changes: we are actively implementing missing auth UX and tokenized CLI MQTT access from feedback.
Evidence: authenticated API smoke succeeded; gap identified in user-facing login redirect UX and non-OAuth CLI path.
Next: capture evidence for Hosted UI login, tenant claim enforcement, and MQTT receive/fallback once code lands.
Risk/Blocker: signed webhook path still blocked by secretsmanager access.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Progress: Launch checklist work is additionally blocked by stack recovery/migration failure in auth rollout attempt.
Evidence: KanbusCloudFoundation now in UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED and recovery call (ContinueUpdateRollback) is AccessDenied for this principal.
Next: recover stack and rerun browser/CLI auth MQTT validation steps.
Risk/Blocker: BLOCKED on CloudFormation recovery IAM permission, in addition to existing webhook secret access gap.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Full pre-acceptance validation passed end-to-end with signed webhook and browser realtime checks.
Evidence: artifacts/cloud-validation/20260307T222139Z/summary.json (all gates passed).
Next: proceed to human UX/design acceptance review using this artifact baseline.
Risk/Blocker: none.
